description:
The ColorRangeInitializer component gives particles a random color lerped between a min and Max color when they are born.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.MinValue: The minimum color a Particle could have when born.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum color a Particle could have when born.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
